package.name: gui_interface
package.description:
Shared "contract" package for the React + rosbridge starter.
It defines the topic names that every node (and the React GUI) must agree on. Instead of typing the string '/button_press' in many places, each node imports it from gui_interface.topics. Change a topic name in ONE file and every Python node updates automatically.
NOTE: This package contains NO nodes. It is a plain Python library that other ROS 2 packages depend on.
